status_quo: Portfolio NOI is overstated by $2.1M because 5 valuation metrics diverge between the property management system and the investor reporting layer. Acquisition models inherit the inflated figures, and LP reports carry numbers that won't survive due-diligence scrutiny.
with_bayesiq: BayesIQ traces every NOI line item from source ledgers through rollup reports, flags the 5 diverging valuation metrics, and lifts the trust score from 41 to 87 — so your next investor deck reflects numbers that hold up under audit.
headline_finding: Portfolio NOI overstated by $2.1M — 5 valuation metrics diverge silently between source systems.
